goal_text:
You are looking for information in Cambridge.
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the 'cheap' price range and should 'include free wifi'.
The hotel should be in the 'east' and should be in the type of 'guesthouse'.
Make sure you get 'postcode' and 'address'.
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be 'in the same area as the hotel'.
Make sure you get 'address' and 'entrance fee'.Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are looking for information in Cambridge
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the cheap price range and should include free wifi
The hotel should be in the east and should be in the type of guesthouse
Make sure you get postcode and address
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the same area as the hotel
Make sure you get address and entrance fee
